title: Repurposed Structures - Buzzier Bees Compat
description: Spawn Buzzier Bees Beekeepers in RS Villages
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Buzzier Bees. (Note, the Apiarist House is a bit uncommon to spawn but is a great find in villages!) Credit to pm095 for creating this datapack.


- Buzzier Bees mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buzzier-bees

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OEr1cDQd/images/2d69ad5ddc72d3b238f91420969bc3834880f467.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OEr1cDQd/images/2d69ad5ddc72d3b238f91420969bc3834880f467.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
